title: Clean local checkout and pull current branch

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Local checkout is on develop at d931c75a and behind origin/develop by 3 commits. Committing the current untracked project artifacts locally first, then pulling with rebase onto origin/develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Pull rebase hit one add/add conflict in the already-versioned rescue-task issue file. Resolving that file in favor of the current remote develop version while keeping the genuinely new local project artifacts.
